data.current_description: Revoke an access or refresh token per RFC 7009.
data.summary_suggestion: Revoke Epic Account access or refresh token
data.description_suggestion: Revoke an access or refresh token for Epic Account Services per RFC 7009. Invalidates the specified token, preventing further use for authentication. Requires the token to be revoked and optional client credentials. After revocation, the token cannot be used for API requests.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic ('Revoke Token' could apply to any token type).
